description: Capability-negotiation conformance vectors for protocol version 1. Each vector gives the capability domains the local node advertises (local_domains) and the domains a peer advertised in its opening Handshake frame (peer_domains). expected_negotiated is the usable set: the intersection of the two, in the frozen domain discriminant order content < management < exec < oplog, independent of the order either side listed its domains. expected_refusals names the domains whose frames the local node must reject from this peer because they were not negotiated; a node must not send frames for a domain the peer did not advertise, and must refuse inbound frames whose domain the peer never declared, rather than guess. A pre-version peer that sends no Handshake is treated as advertising only content and management, the documented baseline before versioned negotiation, so it is modelled here as peer_domains [content, management].
